description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the mhart/alpine-node:latest Docker image with two stages named lint and pages. In the lint stage add a lint job that caches the node_modules directory, runs `npm install --only-dev --ignore-scripts` then `npm run lint`. In the pages stage add a pages job that pulls the node_modules cache (policy: pull), runs only on the master branch, and executes `echo -n "$GQL_BACKEND" | base64 -d > secret.json`, `npm run build`, and `gzip -k public/*.css public/*.html public/*.js`. The pages job publishes the `public` directory as a GitLab Pages artifact. No additional services or variables are defined.
